kept.text:
$AUDC | AudioCodes Q1 Earnings Highlights

🔹 Revenue: $62.1M (Est. $60M) 🟢
🔹 Adj. EPS: $0.14 (Est. $0.13) 🟢
🔹 ARR: $80M; UP nearly +20% YoY
🔹 Conversational AI Business: UP over +50% YoY
🔹 VAIC + Live Hub: Secured significant new client acquisitions and expansions

Segment Revenue:
🔹 Products: $28.1M 
🔹 Services: $34.0M; UP +4.3% YoY

Other Metrics:
🔹 Live Services + Conversational AI ARR: $80M
🔹 Voca CIC: Record quarterly revenue
🔹 Meeting Insights: Continued substantial interest and increasing opportunities
🔹 Total Outstanding Shares: 25.45M

Financials:
🔹 Operating Cash Flow: $12.8M
🔹 Non-GAAP Gross Margin: 66.3% vs 65.2% YoY
🔹 Non-GAAP Operating Income: $4.8M vs $5.4M YoY
🔹 Non-GAAP Operating Margin: 7.7% vs 8.9% YoY
🔹 Cash + Deposits + Marketable Securities + Long-Term Financial Investments: $68.1M

Capital Return:
🔹 Buybacks: Repurchased 1.74M ordinary shares for $13.7M
🔹 Dividend: Paid $0.20/share, or ~$5.3M
🔹 Authorization Remaining: $1.6M

Commentary:
🔸 “I am pleased to announce strong financial results for the first quarter of 2026, reflecting effective execution of our strategic initiatives.”

🔸 “In the first quarter of 2026, we made important progress in our transformation into an AI-driven hybrid cloud software and services organization.”

🔸 “Conversational AI business grew by over 50% year-over-year, underscoring extensive demand for our Voice AI portfolio.”

🔸 “We believe that our increased investments in the Voice AI market will prove beneficial to our business expansion in the coming years.”
